    1. GTNetWithMessages(List, Map, Map, Map, Integer, Integer, Integer, List)

Class GTNetWithMessages

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.model.GTNetWithMessages
public class GTNetWithMessages extends Object
Combined response DTO for the GTNet setup screen, providing all domains and message counts. This DTO is designed to support the GTNetSetupTableComponent frontend view, which displays:
  • A list of all known GTNet domains with their configuration
  • Message counts per domain (for determining if expander should show)
  • Pending reply counts for unanswered requests (columns: "To be answered", "Answer expected")
  • Identification of which entry represents the local instance
Messages are loaded lazily when a row is expanded via separate REST call. The pending reply maps are keyed by idGtNet for efficient UI rendering.
